problem_statement: The scan screen mixes live camera capture with the full manual form, which makes the fast path feel heavier than it is. Repeated grocery capture requires too much visual scanning even when the user only needs to confirm a product and save.
in_scope: Make scan mode camera-first with a compact confirm flow before showing secondary fields
Collapse advanced fields behind an explicit reveal while keeping manual entry available
Preserve quantity unit and location defaults across repeated saves and auto-resume the camera after save in scan mode
requirements: Manual entry remains available as a first-class alternate mode
Unknown barcode flow supports quick naming without forcing the full expanded form first
Phone scan mode shows one primary task region at a time
acceptance_criteria: Saving a scanned item resumes the camera automatically when scan mode remains active
Advanced fields stay collapsed until requested during the normal scan-confirm-save path
Quantity unit and location values persist between consecutive scan saves in one session
risks: Auto-resume camera behavior may feel abrupt if save feedback is not visible long enough
implementation_notes: Keep the existing /api/products/barcode contract unchanged. Update src/components/ScanClient.tsx only for flow and presentation behavior.
